tasks.title: Harden watcher lifecycle contract
tasks.description: Refine watch_repo and stop_watching so backend watcher ownership, replacement, stop semantics, filtering, and coarse event emission remain predictable under repo switches and edit bursts.
steps: Inspect src-tauri/src/watcher.rs and confirm watcher lifecycle ownership stays in Rust, not frontend refresh code
Manually use /spike-d watcher monitor and confirm starting, switching, and stopping watching behaves predictably for a real repo

tasks.title: Add watcher lifecycle and debounce tests
tasks.description: Extend Rust test coverage so path filtering, replacement, stop behavior, and debounced coarse-event semantics are verified by automated tests.
steps: Confirm tests cover suppressed paths, allowed .git paths, and lifecycle stop/replace behavior
Confirm no frontend refresh wiring was introduced while adding watcher verification coverage

nonGoals: Enriching repo-changed payload for UI routing
Diff fetching and changed-file list rendering
